info.name: BuiltGlory Complete Backend APIs
info.description: Generated from mounted Express routes in src/modules. Stale Swagger-only paths are intentionally excluded.

exec: pm.test('Response uses API envelope', function () { pm.expect(body.data || body.error).to.exist; });
